name: Cosmic Astrolabe
description: Notes Part of the Astral Arcanist Set
effects: Hold [Shift] for 1 seconds to change modes Star Fire: Emit flaming stars for 185-315 damage. Empowerment: Gain additional stars while Energized. Teleport to Target MP Decrease (-50 MP) on self for 5 seconds. Ability 1: Space Warp Solar Flare: Curse enemies for 4 seconds within 5.6 tiles. Empowerment: Duration increases to 6.5 seconds while wearing Nebular Rod. Ability 2: Time Warp Effect on Enemy: Stasis for 5 seconds within 4 squares.
